name: wise-personal-momory-pluging
description: Personal work-memory plugin for evidence-backed daily, weekly, and project work traces.

interface.longDescription: A personal agent plugin for maintaining local, evidence-backed work traces from whichever source skills, plugins, connectors, local files, and manual notes are available to the current agent.
defaultPrompt: Use $personal-work-memory-init to seed my work trace.
Use $personal-work-memory to create today's work trace.
Use $personal-history-chat to ask about my work history.
